/usr/bin/ar qc liblib_idl_skeletons.a  CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/DGTS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/SKS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/CONFIGS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/ALARMS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/LOGS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/MMCommonS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/CONFIGManagerS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/ALARMManagerS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/LOGManagerS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/MonitorManagerS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/lib_idl_skeletons.dir/generated/idl/DCFS.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblib_idl_skeletons.a
